embeds.title: MediaWiki:StickyStuck.js ((N!)  +471)
embeds.description: Created page with "\/\/ the script name may sound a bit... y'know what... \/\/ but i swear it DESCRIBES EXACTLY what this does! \/\/ it checks whether position sticky is stuck or not! \/\/ believe me JSRT! \(\(\)=\> \{ 	const el = document.getElementById\('tabs'\); 	if \(!el\) return;  	const sentinel = document.createElement\('div'\); 	el.parentNode.insertBefore\(sentinel, el\);  	new IntersectionObserver\(\(\[entry\]\) =\> \{ 		el.classList.toggle\('is-stuck', !entry.isIntersecting\); 	\}\).observe\(sentinel\); \}\)\(\);"
